title: Children's special allowances (CSA) payment amounts  - Canada.ca
content:
## Children's special allowances (CSA) payment amounts for base years 2021-2024
The maximum monthly amount for the children’s special allowances (CSA) is equal to the maximum amount for the Canada child benefit for children under 6 and for children aged 6 through 17. The CSA may also include a supplement amount for the child disability benefit (CDB).
CSA - children under 6 years of age
CSA - children under
CSA - children aged 6 to 17 years of age
6 to 17 years of age
From July 2025 to June 2026
From July 2024 to June 2025
From July 2023 to June 2024
From July 2022 to June 2023
